name: slopdiff
description: Terminal diff viewer with staging and file collapse

scripts.build: bun build --compile --external term.js --external pty.js index.js --outfile dist/bin/slopdiff
scripts.build:linux: bun build --compile --target=bun-linux-x64 --external term.js --external pty.js index.js --outfile dist/bin/slopdiff-linux-x64
scripts.build:mac-arm: bun build --compile --target=bun-darwin-arm64 --external term.js --external pty.js index.js --outfile dist/bin/slopdiff-macos-arm64
scripts.build:mac-x64: bun build --compile --target=bun-darwin-x64 --external term.js --external pty.js index.js --outfile dist/bin/slopdiff-macos-x64
scripts.build:all: bun build --compile --target=bun-darwin-arm64 --external term.js --external pty.js index.js --outfile dist/bin/slopdiff-macos-arm64 && bun build --compile --target=bun-darwin-x64 --external term.js --external pty.js index.js --outfile dist/bin/slopdiff-macos-x64 && bun build --compile --target=bun-linux-x64 --external term.js --external pty.js index.js --outfile dist/bin/slopdiff-linux-x64
